MMU interrupt clear

Absolute Address:
Base Offset:
0x3fc
Size:
0x4
Source:
syscon_rf.rdl

Description

Write-1-to-pulse; [0]=tbu0 RAS, [1]=tbu0 PMU, [2]=tbu2 RAS, [3]=tbu2 PMU, [4]=tbu3 RAS, [5]=tbu3 PMU, [6]=tbu4 RAS, [7]=tbu4 PMU, [8-16]=TCU events (U84 irq 350-358)

Contents

Bits Identifier Access Reset Decoded Name
[31:17] - - - -
[16:0] mmu_int_clear w 0x0 W1P
